chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-133 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 16-11-2023 Petitioner is present in person Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for Respondent No.2 Mr. Ashfque Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner present in person submits that prayer No.1 in respect of salary has already been granted and he has been paid all the amount of salary but his application for regularization of his service has not been decided. Learned counsel for FBR submits that his contract has already expired and he is not in service since 2017. In any case, if any application filed by the petitioner is pending for regularization of his service, it shall be decided in accordance with law within a period of two months. The petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
